audit_items.proof_trace: Handler lacks epoch-based deprecation guard. No rejection when current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS (4096). Handler remains registered in Fulu fork map (rpc.go:52) and continues serving requests indefinitely as long as data is in retention window.
audit_items.attack_scenario: After FULU_FORK_EPOCH + 4096 epochs, peers send blob_sidecars_by_root requests for recent blobs. Node serves them normally instead of rejecting, delaying PeerDAS migration and enabling resource exhaustion via legacy RPC paths.
